commit.message:
Fix /posts page prerender failure at build time

The page had `force-static` which forced Next.js to render it during
`docker build`, causing a Postgres connection failure (DB only reachable
at runtime). Changed to `force-dynamic` so it renders on request.

commit.message:
Add OCR text verification for interaction prompts, improve arrival detection

- Add EasyOCR (ru+en) to verify interaction_prompt text contains fishing keywords
- YOLO detects the prompt box, OCR reads it, only stop for fishing holes
- Wayshrines, NPCs, doors are now correctly ignored during run
- Add circling detection (marker flipping sides = orbiting waypoint)
- Reduce MARKER_LOST_THRESHOLD 8→4 for faster arrival detection
- Speed up Phase B turning (~2x faster mouse arc + shorter pauses)
- Switch model path to v3 (YOLO11l)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: WhatsApp Dockerfile — write gitconfig directly for SSH→HTTPS redirect (#40)

Root cause: `git config --global` with same section name overwrites
the previous insteadOf entry. Writing the config file directly preserves
both entries (ssh:// and git@github.com: redirects to https://).

Verified working in Docker: baileys + libsignal install via HTTPS.

Co-authored-by: KenRoach <your.email@example.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: lifecycle management — kill zombie processes, force EdgeChromium, clean shutdown

- Add ensure_port_available() to kill stale processes holding the port
- Force gui='edgechromium' on Windows for reliable WebSocket support
- Add app.on_shutdown(os._exit) for clean server death on window close
- Use main_window.destroy() for close button (avoids browser dialog)
- Set confirm_close=False to prevent pywebview "are you sure?" prompt
- Set easy_drag=True for frameless window dragging without CSS hacks
- Set private_mode=False to enable font caching in pywebview
- Add global CSS overrides to force orange on ALL Quasar elements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(scripts): Use existing ANTHROPIC_API_KEY from env if available

Only load from .env if ANTHROPIC_API_KEY isn't already set in the
environment. This allows running the script from a shell that has
a valid key set (same as the running backend) without being
overridden by potentially stale values in .env.

commit.message:
Add Theodore Furcade async research agent (backend + frontend)

New agent "Theo" processes archaeological research questions asynchronously
via a background worker using Qwen3.5-9B local model. Users submit questions
with effort presets (quick/deep/full/auto), get queued, and receive structured
reports with site links and pipeline traces. 24h TTL with auto-cleanup.

Backend: ResearchRequest DB model, worker reusing run_agent_stream(),
5 REST+SSE endpoints, effort config, system prompt.
Frontend: /theo.html research lab page with submit form, queue list,
report overlay with markdown rendering, browser notifications.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Phase 1 & 2: Design System Foundation + Component Library

## Phase 1: Design System Foundation
- Complete design token system with light/dark theme support
- Created ThemeProvider with localStorage persistence and system preference detection
- No-flash loading script to prevent theme flicker
- CSS variables for seamless theme switching
- SVG icon system with Lucide React
- Icon wrapper component for consistent sizing
- Theme switcher UI in settings page
- Replaced emoji icons with professional SVG icons

## Phase 2: Component Library
Created comprehensive UI component library:

### Interactive Components
- Modal/Dialog (Radix UI) with backdrop blur and animations
- Toast notification system (sonner) with theme support
- Button with 5 variants and 3 sizes, loading states, icon support
- Input with label, error states, icons, full accessibility
- Textarea with auto-resize functionality
- Select dropdown (Radix UI) with keyboard navigation
- Checkbox with custom styling
- Switch toggle (perfect for theme switcher)

### Feedback Components
- Skeleton loader with shimmer animation and pre-built patterns
- Spinner with multiple sizes and SpinnerOverlay
- EmptyState component for "no content" scenarios

### Enhancements
- Added animations: fadeIn, slideUp, pulse, spin, shimmer
- All components respect prefers-reduced-motion
- Full WCAG AA accessibility compliance
- Theme-aware styling throughout
- Toaster added to root layout for global toast access

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add raw PadChest CSV to gitignore

fix: correct App Store Connect integration name to 'Multiriesgos'

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Pipeline observability, entity resolution, tree editor rewrite

- Telemetry system: pipelineTelemetry (event accumulator), llmTracker
  (cost tracking), full instrumentation across all pipeline stages
- Pipeline Monitor widget: real-time event stream with LLM/compute
  distinction, alternating run colors, scrollable data previews
- LLM Cost Dashboard widget: token/cost tracking by category/model/day
- Entity resolution: multi-signal scorer (Jaro-Winkler, co-occurrence,
  topic overlap, temporal, type compatibility)
- Tree editor rewrite: multi-entity single-pass editing, search loops,
  CREATE verification, improved prompts for content quality and dedup
- Extraction prompt: enforce entity object format {name, type}
- Fix unknown-type entities being silently dropped
- Plugin runner: add LLM call category for cost tracking

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix rate limiting iteration burn and complete GSD lifecycle

Rate limit fix: empty output path now sets RETRY_ITERATION=1 so iterations
aren't wasted on failed attempts (both empty output and explicit rate limit
detection now correctly retry the same iteration).

Lifecycle fix: PROMPT.md now covers the full post-phase flow — audit-milestone
with correct file path (v*-MILESTONE-AUDIT.md), plan-milestone-gaps for both
gaps_found and tech_debt, re-audit loop until clean, and complete-milestone
for archival/tagging which was previously missing entirely.

commit.message:
Upgrade recommendations with JLC framework, technical analysis & entry points

Backend (ai/recommendations.py):
- Integrate JLC market framework (VIX, VVIX, HYG, yields, DXY, TGA,
  reverse repos, Fear&Greed) for market regime assessment
- Add batch technical screening of ~80 candidate tickers (RSI, SMA20/50,
  distance from 52w high) to pre-filter opportunities
- Include analyst video transcripts (JLC, Hopla, Bravos) from Drive
- Claude now receives JLC methodology rules (Elliott, Wyckoff, divergences,
  Donchian, risk management) and must provide entry/stop-loss levels
- Each recommendation includes technical object with entry_price, stop_loss,
  RSI, trend, key_levels

Frontend (analysis/page.tsx):
- Display technical section per recommendation card (entry price in green,
  stop loss in red, RSI with color coding, trend indicator, key levels)
- Updated loading text to reflect broader analysis scope

commit.message:
fix: fix chart blur by using setTransform instead of scale accumulation

Replace ctx.scale(dpr,dpr) with ctx.setTransform(dpr,0,0,dpr,0,0) to
always set an absolute transform matrix. WebKit may skip canvas reset
when dimensions are unchanged, causing scale to compound on each draw call.
Also increase line widths slightly for crisper rendering.

- CSS columns → CSS Grid (supprime le re-layout cascade sur chaque image chargée)
- sticky top-4 → self-start (supprime scroll-linked repaint inutile)
- loading="lazy" sur les thumbnails (évite le décodage simultané de toutes les photos)

Corrige les barres blanches + freeze complet du navigateur sur la page portfolio.

commit.message:
Fix: sidebar not refreshing after adding a new profile

ProfileStore had refreshTrigger specifically for this purpose but MainView
never read it, so SwiftUI's Observation framework never created a subscription.
Without the subscription, @Query changes inside NavigationSplitView on macOS
don't reliably trigger view invalidation. Reading refreshTrigger in
filteredProfiles creates the missing @Observable dependency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

test: add regression tests for VDP Shadow/Highlight fixes

- shadow_highlight_dac_accuracy: verify shadow_channel/highlight_channel
  match the 4-bit DAC model for all 8 MD color levels
- shadow_highlight_transparent_plane_a_priority_prevents_shadow: verify
  transparent plane A tiles with priority bit set prevent shadowing of
  underlying plane B pixels (Comix Zone title roll-down fix)
- shadow_highlight_control_sprite_does_not_occupy_sprite_layer: verify
  S/H control sprites (palette 3, color 14/15) don't block subsequent
  normal sprites from rendering at the same position

commit.message:
Fix PWA Service Worker cache strategy for Firestore real-time sync

Problems fixed:
1. SW update did not auto-reload the page → users kept running stale JS
   bundles even after a new SW activated (skipWaiting). Added a
   'controllerchange' listener in main.tsx that calls window.location.reload()
   so the latest code always runs immediately after an SW update.

2. No explicit cache bypass for Firebase / Google API endpoints. Added
   NetworkOnly runtime-caching rules in vite.config.ts workbox config for:
   - firestore.googleapis.com (Firestore REST + gRPC-Web)
   - identitytoolkit.googleapis.com (Firebase Auth)
   - securetoken.googleapis.com (token refresh)
   - firebase.googleapis.com
   - *.googleapis.com (catch-all)
   - accounts.google.com (Google OAuth)
   This guarantees the SW never serves a cached auth token or stale
   Firestore payload, ensuring both members always see live data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
